MakerJasper AIGrammarly Inc.
PricingPlans start around $49/mo; no permanent free tier (free trial only)Free plan available; Premium from $12/mo
Free tierNoYes
Best forMarketing teams needing on-brand copy at scale.Everyday proofreading and tone-checking across any app.
